commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And why has the LORD brought us unto this land, to fall by the sword, that our wives and our children should be a prey. were it not better for us to return into Egypt. The Latin manuscripts and Bibles before Sixtus V read, "in Egypt, and not in this "But the present translation agrees with the Hebrew, Septuagint, and Chaldean. (Calmet) They obtained what they said they wished for, ver. (Worthington) And that. Hebrew, "and wherefore hath God brought us into this land, that we may fall "In a rage they attribute a malicious design to God. (Calmet) Better. And who would have given them food in the wilderness. (Menochius).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
